name: @llm-crane/vscode-extension
description: Local-first, developer-first LLM orchestrator for VS Code.

llmCrane.defaultModelStrategy.markdownDescription: Default model strategy for new tasks when panel stays on user default mode. `specific` requires `llmCrane.defaultSpecificModelId`.

llmCrane.defaultSpecificModelId.markdownDescription: Configured model id used when `llmCrane.defaultModelStrategy` is `specific`. Unknown or unconfigured model blocks submission with clear error.

llmCrane.allowAutomaticFallback.markdownDescription: Allow executor to switch to configured fallback model when preferred model fails with eligible provider error.

llmCrane.allowVerificationUpgrade.markdownDescription: Allow verifier-driven model upgrade suggestion and rerun action for new tasks. When disabled, upgrade suggestions are downgraded to manual confirmation.

llmCranePackaging.name: llm-crane
llmCranePackaging.description: Local-first, developer-first LLM orchestrator for VS Code.
